title: Tyler (TYL) to Modernize Lima Court & Public Safety Systems
text: The implementation of Tyler's (TYL) solutions is likely to modernize the Lima Municipal Court's case management system and streamline the Lima Police Department's work processes.

title: City of Lima, Ohio, Selects Enterprise Public Safety and Justice Solutions from Tyler Technologies
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed an agreement in Lima, Ohio, for Tyler's enterprise public safety and justice solutions.

title: Tyler Technologies Announces 2022 Maine App Challenge Winners
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced the winners of its 2022 Maine App Challenge, a contest that challenges students to build a mobile application.

title: Tyler (TYL) to Upgrade Fairfield Court & Public Safety Systems
text: The implementation of Tyler's (TYL) solutions is likely to modernize the Fairfield County Probate and Juvenile Court's case management system and streamline Fairfield County Sheriff's Office's work processes.

title: Tyler Technologies to Provide Public Safety and Justice Solutions to Fairfield County, Ohio
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $TYL #TylerTech--Tyler Technologies announced it has signed two agreements in Fairfield County, Ohio, for its public safety and justice solutions.

title: 3 Undervalued Stocks to Buy That Are Preparing to Rocket in 2022
text: We're at that buying when others are fearful stage, but prepare more smartly with three undervalued stocks offering big-time sales growth. The post 3 Undervalued Stocks to Buy That Are Preparing to Rocket in 2022 appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Is Tyler (TYL) Worth Buying Amid Current Market Uncertainties?
text: Tyler Technologies (TYL) is one stock investors may consider adding to their portfolio amid the current stock market uncertainties and gain from its upside potential.

title: Tyler Technologies to Participate in June 2022 Investor Conferences
text: PLANO, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Tyler Technologies will participate in two investor conferences in June 2022.

title: Nearmap location data integrated into workflows of America's largest provider of Computer Assisted Mass Appraisals for properties
text: Leading appraisal software and services firm, Tyler Technologies, embeds Nearmap aerial imagery and data into its proprietary property appraisal system to streamline the assessment of millions of properties in the U.S. SALT LAKE CITY , June 6, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The assessment of millions of properties by government officials and property appraisers in the U.S. will be hugely improved and streamlined following a powerful partnership by leading location intelligence and aerial imagery firm, Nearmap, and America's largest provider of computer assisted mass appraisals (CAMA) for properties, Tyler Technologies (Tyler). Nationwide across the U.S., Tyler's mass appraisal, tax billing, and collections software solutions help to ensure fair and equitable property assessments and timely taxation of more than 97 million property 'parcels'.

title: 5 Business Services Stocks to Buy on Solid Job Data for May
text: We have narrowed our search to five business services stocks that have solid potential for the rest of 2022. These are: KFRC, IBEX, TYL, CCRN and RCMT.

title: Tyler (TYL) Boosts ERP Solution Portfolio With Quatred Buyout
text: The integration of Quatred solutions is likely to help Tyler (TYL) strengthen its enterprise resource planning and enterprise asset maintenance solutions and offerings.
